landing.hero_subtitle: ADX DUBAI — fast, secure, professional crypto trading platform. Buy, sell, deposit and withdraw USDT, BTC, ETH, TRX and BNB instantly, backed by institutional-grade infrastructure.
landing.about_p1: Founded on 15 November 2000, ADX DUBAI is a forward-looking financial markets platform inspired by the standards of Dubai Financial Markets. For more than two decades, our mission has been the same: bring institutional-grade market infrastructure, transparent execution and disciplined risk management to a wider universe of investors.
landing.about_p2: We bridge the discipline of traditional capital markets with the speed and accessibility of modern blockchain assets. Through advanced trading technology, real-time price discovery sourced from the world's top venues, and investor-centric services, ADX DUBAI empowers individuals and institutions to participate confidently in the next generation of global markets.
landing.about_p3: Our regional focus is rooted in a single conviction: emerging and frontier markets deserve the same quality of access, liquidity and security as established financial centres. From secure custody and KYC-aligned operations to 24/7 multi-asset trading, every system at ADX DUBAI is engineered for trust.
landing.pillar1_text: Low-latency matching, real-time market data and battle-tested infrastructure.
landing.pillar2_text: Transparent fees, secure custody and dedicated 24/7 live support for every client.
landing.pillar3_text: Bringing world-class access to growth markets across the MENA region and beyond.
landing.f1_text: Segregated custody, encrypted operations and multi-layer account protection inspired by capital-market best practice.
landing.f2_text: Live prices, depth and 24-hour candles sourced from the world's top liquidity venues — refreshed every few seconds.
landing.f3_text: Buy and sell BTC, ETH, BNB, TRX and USDT instantly with transparent pricing and fast confirmations.
landing.f4_text: Fund your account across major networks with clear, traceable receipts and automated confirmations.
landing.f5_text: A real human team is available around the clock to help with deposits, withdrawals and account questions.
landing.f6_text: Trade from any device. Our interface is optimised for desktop, tablet and mobile without compromise.
landing.cta_title: Open your ADX DUBAI account today
landing.cta_text: Join hundreds of thousands of traders accessing professional crypto markets through a single, secure platform.

footer.tagline: Institutional-grade digital asset trading inspired by the standards of Dubai Financial Markets. Established 15 November 2000.
footer.disclaimer: Digital asset trading involves risk. Trade responsibly.
